question: TikTok or YouTube — which is the better platform for learning new skills?

chatgpt.reason: Longer, more structured videos on YouTube deliver higher-quality, more complete learning than TikTok's short, engagement-focused content.
chatgpt.raw:
VERDICT: YouTube for deeper skill learning
REASON: Longer, more structured videos on YouTube tend to deliver higher-quality, more complete learning than TikTok’s short, engagement-focused content.

perplexity.reason: YouTube supports longer, structured tutorials and thorough explanations.
perplexity.raw: VERDICT: YouTube for deeper learningREASON: It supports longer, structured tutorials and thorough explanations.

gemini.verdict: YouTube for depth, TikTok for discovery
gemini.reason: YouTube provides deeper learning while TikTok serves as a discovery tool for initial skill exploration.
gemini.raw: VERDICT: YouTube for depth, TikTok discovery.

consensus.label: moderate
consensus.summary: All three agree YouTube is superior for in-depth skill learning, but Gemini uniquely acknowledges TikTok's value for discovery, while ChatGPT and Perplexity dismiss it entirely for learning purposes.
